subject: more hpl money sent to enron

emails.subject: FW: More HPL money sent to ENRON
emails.subject_base: More HPL money sent to ENRON
emails.body: FW: More HPL money sent to ENRON Here is the answer on the El Paso To: Zisman, Stuart; Coffey Jr., Jim; Redmond, Brian

emails.subject: RE: More HPL money sent to ENRON
emails.subject_base: More HPL money sent to ENRON
emails.body: hey, why get in the middle. its not our responsibility to get AEP their money. Don't you think it would be cleaner to just give it back to EL Paso. To: Parks, Joe

emails.subject: RE: More HPL money sent to ENRON
emails.subject_base: More HPL money sent to ENRON
emails.body: I think that is right. So long as it is absolutely clear that the money was paid in error, return the money to El Paso that was erroneously sent by El Paso to ENA. I am sending a carbon copy of this to Barbara Gray to confirm that I am giving the correct advice. Stuart To: Zisman, Stuart
